ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
BONUS – Launch Partnership
Client Selection Checklist
What to look for in a client…
Developed & tested product or idea
¨ Someone who has worked with people (partners/coaches/outside support)
¨ Created success for people
¨ Hopefully worked with groups of people and created success for groups of people
¨ At least started organizing their thoughts
¨ At least has an outline of what their course or what their product would look like
¨ It’s much better if they've actually got the product done
¨ That's the bare minimum
An offer that sells
¨ Is this something that has a hungry market?
¨ Is there a market that wants to buy this product?
¨ Will this excite the prospect?
¨ You have to do some research.
They have to be able to produce the product
¨ They have to be able to produce the Prelaunch
¨ They have to be able to stand in front of the camera and deliver video
¨ If not, could you find some other talent to put in front of the camera?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
BONUS – Launch Partnership
¨ You have to find someone who's gonna to be able to sell – you're looking for
someone who can sell with conviction
At some point, you're going to need a team
¨ Who's going to be on the team?
¨ Can they bring the team?
Other important questions to consider…
¨ Who's bringing the partners?
¨ Can they bring the partners?
¨ Do they have an email list?
¨ Will they actually pay you?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
